name: Easy Coloring Spongy Adventure
description: Easy Coloring Spongy Adventure is a fun and relaxing HTML5 coloring game made for kids and anyone who loves creative play. Join Spongy on a cheerful adventure filled with cute scenes and simple drawings waiting to be brought to life with color. There’s no time limit and no pressure—just pick your favorite colors, tap to paint, and enjoy a calm, playful coloring experience directly in your browser.
